MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Robert Balian. Francisco G. Torres, Esq. and there being no appearance by Defendant, Steven Joshua Gonzalez, the case is removed from settlement conference, request for jury trial is stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
